scripts.test:search: node --test tests/song-search-core.test.mjs tests/search-preview.test.mjs tests/search-ranking.test.mjs tests/search-filters-pagination.test.mjs tests/song-rollback-history.test.mjs tests/xss-sanitization.test.mjs tests/web-security-helpers.test.mjs tests/public-api-error-normalization.test.mjs
scripts.test:thesis-evidence: node --test tests/song-search-core.test.mjs tests/search-preview.test.mjs tests/search-ranking.test.mjs tests/search-filters-pagination.test.mjs tests/song-card-endpoint.test.mjs tests/auth-protected-actions.test.mjs tests/song-rollback-history.test.mjs tests/xss-sanitization.test.mjs tests/web-security-helpers.test.mjs tests/public-api-error-normalization.test.mjs
scripts.build: npx wrangler pages functions build functions --outdir .wrangler-build
scripts.check: npm run encoding:check && npm run i18n:check && npm run i18n:draft:check && npm run test:search && npm run build
